stories.headline: California Adds 9 New Michelin-Starred Restaurants For 2026 - Forbes
stories.summary: Californios and Enclos were elevated to Three Michelin Stars, Kato in Los Angeles rose to Two Stars, and nine restaurants earned their first Michelin star in California.

stories.headline: Country star Bailey Zimmerman burned bandmates and shoved guitarist before trashing hotel room, affidavit says - Page Six
stories.summary: Bailey Zimmerman faces a felony criminal damage charge and a misdemeanor after his stay at Sandia Resort and Casino.

stories.headline: Horoscope for Thursday, June 25, 2026 - Chicago Sun-Times
Lionel Richie cuts St. Paul performance short after falling ill - Bring Me The News
stories.summary: The soul legend was performing at the Grand Casino Arena as part of a co-headlining tour with Earth, Wind & Fire.

stories.headline: ‘Lucky Strike’ Review: Scott Eastwood and Colin Hanks in Rod Davis Lurie’s Derivative World War II Thriller - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Aunjanue Ellis-Taylor co-stars in the film about an American soldier trapped behind enemy lines.

stories.headline: Millie Bobby Brown On Duffer Brothers Pact About What Really Happened To Eleven On 'Stranger Things' - Deadline
stories.summary: The series finale of Stranger Things left many questions about what really happened to Millie Bobby Brown's Eleven, and the actress actually knows what happened in the end.

stories.headline: Zendaya Stuns in Vintage $35 Spider-Man T-Shirt for ‘Brand New Day’ Event in Paris - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: “Style doesn’t always have to cost a fortune,” Law Roach, the Emmy winner's longtime stylist, wrote in an Instagram Story on Wednesday.

stories.headline: Signs point to Travis Kelce-Taylor Swift wedding at Madison Square Garden on July 4 weekend - NBC Sports
stories.summary: Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce and megastar Taylor Swift apparently will be tying the knot in New York City.
